title: hellenia rubra
intro: Hellenia rubra, also known as Red Hellebore, is a flowering plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, characterized by its bright red flowers and shiny green foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the nervous system and act as a cardiac and respiratory stimulant. The health benefits of Hellenia rubra include its potential use in treating conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and stimulate circulation. Hellenia rubra is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote respiratory health and relieve symptoms of respiratory distress.
